tracks.aiDesc: Learn machine learning, vision, and practical AI deployment.
tracks.robotDesc: Build, program, and control robots from hardware to behavior.

hero.title: Build Future with AI and Robotics
hero.subtitle: Hands-on programs for students, families, and schools
hero.description: RobotX Education helps the next generation build confidence through engineering projects. From coding and sensing to autonomous systems, our courses turn abstract concepts into real products.

ai.title: AI Course Introduction
ai.description: Our AI course introduces core ideas in machine learning, computer vision, and model deployment through guided projects. Students train small models, analyze data, and ship practical AI features they can demonstrate.

robot.title: Robot Course Introduction
robot.description: Our robotics track blends design, electronics, and coding. Learners assemble robots, connect sensors and controllers, and program movement and decision-making in real environments.

hero.title: Learn Robotics. Learn AI. Embrace Future.

robot.title: Robot Courses
robot.subtitle: We teach robotics setup, manipulation, and secondary development for future-ready engineering skills.

originman.title: OriginMan Humanoid Development
originman.desc: Humanoid robot setup, motion control, and development workflow template.

ai.title: AI Courses
ai.subtitle: We teach how to master AI tools and boost productivity in real project workflows.

openclaw.title: OpenClaw AI Workflow
openclaw.desc: Practical AI tools and deployment learning path for students and creators.

openclaw.title: OpenClaw AI Course Template
openclaw.intro: This template is prepared for your upcoming tutorial content. Replace this text with your real lesson overview.

setup.title: Environment Setup
setup.body: Describe required tools, account setup, and prerequisites for learners.

subA.title: Step 1: Install and Configure
subA.body: Add install links, version notes, and initial checks.

subB.title: Step 2: Verify Workspace
subB.body: Explain how learners can verify their local or cloud workspace is ready.

workflow.title: Core AI Workflow
workflow.body: Explain prompt design, model interaction, and iterative testing in this section.

subA.title: Tool Integration
subA.body: Show how to connect AI output to real robot or software tasks.

practice.title: Practice Project
practice.body: Add a hands-on mini project and evaluation checklist for students.

originman.title: OriginMan Robot Course Template
originman.intro: This template is prepared for your upcoming robot tutorial content. Replace this text with your final course material.

assembly.title: Robot Assembly and Setup
assembly.body: Describe hardware components, assembly sequence, and safety checks.

subA.title: Mechanical Setup
subA.body: Document frame assembly, motors, and connector layout.

subB.title: Power and Controller Check
subB.body: Add startup checklist and troubleshooting steps.

motion.title: Manipulation and Motion Control
motion.body: Introduce basic movement programming and manipulation control logic.

subA.title: Calibration and Testing
subA.body: Add motion calibration workflow and expected results.

secondaryDev.title: Secondary Development
secondaryDev.body: Provide extension ideas for sensors, behaviors, and custom modules.

hero.title: Why Families Choose RobotX
hero.subtitle: Understandable, intuitive, and inspiring learning experiences

reasons.title: Why choose our courses
reasons.understandableDesc: We break complex AI and robotics topics into clear steps that students can actually apply.
reasons.intuitiveDesc: Every lesson follows a practical build-first path, so learners see results quickly.
reasons.multimediaDesc: Our content combines short explanations, illustrative visuals, and hands-on demos.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Our mission is to help the next generation engage with the latest robotics and AI technology through practical education, creativity, and community impact.

media.title: Learn by Seeing and Building
media.description: Students learn faster when they can read, watch, and build in the same lesson flow.

hero.title: Careers at RobotX
hero.subtitle: Join our nonprofit team and help students access future-ready education

details.title: Event Operator Contractor
details.descriptionValue: Support robotics and AI education events, coordinate logistics, set up learning stations, and assist students and families during workshops and school activities.

form.placeholderWhyUs: Share why you want to work with RobotX and this role.

hero.title: Community Events
hero.subtitle: Hands-on workshops, demos, and school collaborations

cards.c1Desc: Students and parents build mini robotics projects and experience AI demos.
cards.c2Desc: Our instructors visit partner schools to run engaging technology sessions.

hero.title: Donate
hero.subtitle: Help us bring robotics learning to more students

content.title: Donate Robots to Schools and Universities
content.description: We are not yet set up with Stripe. If you would like to donate robots, kits, or equipment to schools, colleges, or universities through our nonprofit, please contact us directly at info@usrobotx.com.

hero.title: Become a Partner
hero.subtitle: Collaborate with us to educate the younger generation

content.title: Partnership Opportunities
content.description: We partner with schools, companies, and community organizations to expand access to AI and robotics education through programs, events, and resources.
